rationale: Both reviews correctly flag the True-stub ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup and premature IsUnipotent (all confirmable in the diff), but Review 2 additionally recognizes AffineAlgGroup and AlgPoints as legitimate Layer-0 foundations worth preserving and prescribes a split PR, producing a coherent buildable result; Review 1's extra bundling finding cites an off-diff roadmap rule and if acted on causes unnecessary churn without clearly improving the PR.
